utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 appear. Now check if each is fully specified with all details including costs: 1) health_coverage: specifies plan names but lacks clear benefits/coverage limits; however the required format asks for 'physical and mental health insurance with costs'—the associated cost is given but as a separate key (health_coverage_cost). Together, it effectively includes cost. 2) property_coverage: describes coverage type and mentions €12,000 equipment; cost is provided in separate key. Acceptable. 3) travel_coverage: specifies dates (Feb 20–Mar 5), plan and add-on; cost provided as one-time. Adequate. 4) additional_services: described plans and activities; cost provided. Adequate. 5) total_budget: provides monthly recurring and one-time; however, monthly total appears inconsistent if summing listed monthly items (165 + 90 + 130 = 385, matches). Travel one-time €130 aligns. Overall, all 5 items are present with costs, though costs are sometimes provided in separate fields, but still complete per format intent.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We identify each item named in the final coverage plan and match it exactly to the corresponding option in the ground-truth ratings. Items found: Health coverage uses InsurePlus Standard Plan for both physical and mental health; property coverage selects PrimeHome Premium Coverage; travel coverage uses InsurePlus Standard Plan plus Adventure Travel Coverage add-on; additional services list General Adventure Activities Insurance described as InsurePlus Standard Plan + Adventure Travel Coverage Add-on, which maps to the same two rated items.
